CGAL::Polyline_simplification_2::Hybrid_.name: CGAL::Polyline_simplification_2::Hybrid_squared_distance_cost
CGAL::Polyline_simplification_2::Hybrid_.brief: This class is a cost function which calculates the cost as the square of the distance between the original and simplified polylines, possibly scaled based on a factor.

members.name: Hybrid_squared_distance_cost
members.brief: Initializes the cost function with the specified ratio .

members.name: operator()
members.brief: Compute the hybrid squared distance cost.
members.detailed: Given a vertex in constraint iterator vicq computes vicp=std::prev(vicq) and vicr=std::next(vicq) , returns the maximal square distance between each point along the original subpolyline, between vicp and vicr , and the straight line segment from *vicp->point() to *vicr->point() divided by the smallest of the square of the ratio given to the constructor of the cost function, and the shortest squared distance between that segment and each of the vertices adjacent to vicq . CDT must be CGAL::Constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_2 with a vertex type that is model of PolylineSimplificationVertexBase_2 .
members.argsstring: (const Constrained_triangulation_plus_2< CDT > &pct, typename Constrained_triangulation_plus_2< CDT >::Vertices_in_constraint_iterator vicq) const

members.name: Polyline_simplification_2
members.argsstring: (PCT &pct, Constraint_id cid, CostFunction cost, StopFunction stop)

members.brief: Given a vertex in constraint iterator vicq computes vicp=std::prev(vicq) and vicr=std::next(vicq) , returns the maximum of the square distances between each point along the original subpolyline between vicp and vicr , and the straight line segment from *vicp->point() to *vicr->point() divided by the shortest squared distance between that segment and each of the vertices adjacent to vicq .
members.detailed: CDT must be CGAL::Constrained_Delaunay_triangulation_2 with a vertex type that is model of PolylineSimplificationVertexBase_2 .
members.argsstring: (const Constrained_triangulation_plus_2< CDT > &pct, typename Constrained_triangulation_plus_2< CDT >::Vertices_in_constraint_iterator vicq) const

members.name: operator()
members.brief: Returns true when ( current_count / initial_count ) is smaller or equal than the threshold.

CGAL::Polyline_simplification_2::Vertex_.name: CGAL::Polyline_simplification_2::Vertex_base_2

PolylineSimplificationCostFunction.name: PolylineSimplificationCostFunction
PolylineSimplificationCostFunction.brief: Models of this concept are passed to the polyline simplification algorithm to calculate the cost of removing a vertex. Such a cost represents some measure of the deviation error between the polyline sets before and after removal. The smaller the error the lower the cost. The algorithm processes vertices in increasing cost order to preserve the overall polyline set shape as much as possible.

members.name: operator()
members.brief: Given a vertex in constraint iterator viq computes vip=std::prev(viq) and vir=std::next(vir) , and the cost of removing vertex *viq , replacing edges (*vip,*viq) and (*viq,*vir) with edge (*vip,*vir) .
members.detailed: ct The underlying constrained Delaunay triangulation which embeds the polyline constraints viq The vertex in constraint iterator of the vertex to remove The cost for removing *viq . The value std::nullopt can be returned to indicate an infinite or uncomputable cost. CDT must be CGAL::Constrained_triangulation_plus_2 with a vertex type that is model of PolylineSimplificationVertexBase_2 . CDT::Geom_traits must be model of the concept ConstrainedDelaunayTriangulationTraits_2 .
members.argsstring: (CGAL::Constrained_triangulation_plus_2< CDT > const &ct, CGAL::Constrained_triangulation_plus_2< CDT >::Vertices_in_constraint_iterator viq) const

PolylineSimplificationStopPredicate.name: PolylineSimplificationStopPredicate
PolylineSimplificationStopPredicate.brief: Models of this concept are passed to the polyline simplification algorithm to indicate when to stop the process.

members.name: operator()
members.brief: Indicates if the simplification must be stopped.
members.detailed: This is called right before each vertex is about to be removed. ct The underlying constrained Delaunay triangulation which embeds the polyline constraints q The current vertex about to be removed cost The associated cost for removing the current vertex (as given by PolylineSimplificationCostFunction ) initial_count The initial number of vertices in the entire polyline set (including intersection vertices not in any source polyline) current_count The current number of vertices true if the algorithm should stop, false if it should continue. CDT must be CGAL::Constrained_triangulation_plus_2 with a vertex type that is model of PolylineSimplificationVertexBase_2 .
members.argsstring: (const CGAL::Constrained_triangulation_plus_2< CDT > &ct, CGAL::Constrained_triangulation_plus_2< CDT >::Vertex_handle q, typename CDT::Geom_traits::FT cost, std::size_t initial_count, std::size_t current_count) const

PolylineSimplificationVertexBase_2.name: PolylineSimplificationVertexBase_2
PolylineSimplificationVertexBase_2.brief: The polyline simplification algorithm stores in the vertices whether a vertex can be removed, and the cost of the removal.

members.name: is_removable
members.brief: indicates whether the vertex can be removed.

members.name: set_removable
members.brief: allows to set whether the vertex can be removed.

members.name: cost
members.brief: returns the cost of the vertex removal.

members.name: set_cost
members.brief: allows to set the cost of the vertex removal.

members.name: FT
members.brief: A number type which must be the same as the FT of the geometric traits class of the triangulation.

PkgPolylineSimplification2Ref.name: PkgPolylineSimplification2Ref
PkgPolylineSimplification2Ref.detailed: Andreas Fabri This package enables to simplify polylines with the guarantee that the topology of the polylines does not change. This can be done for a single polyline as well as for a set of polyline constraints in a constrained triangulation. The simplification can be controlled with cost and stop functions. Introduced in: CGAL 4.6 Depends on: PkgTriangulation2 BibTeX: cgal:f-ps2-26a License: GPL Windows Demo: Polyline Simplification Classified Reference Pages Concepts PolylineSimplificationCostFunction PolylineSimplificationStopPredicate PolylineSimplificationVertexBase_2 Classes CGAL::Polyline_simplification_2::Squared_distance_cost CGAL::Polyline_simplification_2::Scaled_squared_distance_cost CGAL::Polyline_simplification_2::Hybrid_squared_distance_cost CGAL::Polyline_simplification_2::Stop_above_cost_threshold CGAL::Polyline_simplification_2::Stop_below_count_threshold CGAL::Polyline_simplification_2::Stop_below_count_ratio_threshold CGAL::Polyline_simplification_2::Vertex_base_2 Global Functions CGAL::Polyline_simplification_2::simplify()

members.name: simplify
members.brief: Simplifies a single polygon.
members.detailed: Traits must be a model of ConstrainedDelaunayTriangulationTraits_2 CostFunction must be a model of PolylineSimplificationCostFunction . StopFunction must be a model of PolylineSimplificationStopPredicate Any CGAL kernel can be used for Traits , but as the traits class is used for internally using a constrained Delaunay triangulation, it should be a kernel with at least exact predicates.
members.argsstring: (const CGAL::Polygon_2< Traits, Container > &polygon, CostFunction cost, StopFunction stop)

members.name: simplify
members.brief: Simplifies a single polygon with holes.
members.detailed: Traits must be a model of ConstrainedDelaunayTriangulationTraits_2 CostFunction must be a model of PolylineSimplificationCostFunction . StopFunction must be a model of PolylineSimplificationStopPredicate Any CGAL kernel can be used for Traits , but as the traits class is used for internally using a constrained Delaunay triangulation, it should be a kernel with at least exact predicates.
members.argsstring: (const CGAL::Polygon_with_holes_2< Traits, Container > &polygon, CostFunction cost, StopFunction stop)

members.name: simplify
members.brief: Simplifies an open or closed polyline given as an iterator range of 2D CGAL points.
members.detailed: PointIterator must be an iterator with value type Kernel::Point_2 . CostFunction must be a model of PolylineSimplificationCostFunction StopFunction must be a model of PolylineSimplificationStopPredicate PointOutputIterator must be an output iterator to which Kernel::Point_2 can be assigned.
members.argsstring: (PointIterator b, PointIterator e, CostFunction cost, StopFunction stop, PointOutputIterator out, bool close=false)

members.name: simplify
members.brief: Simplifies a single polyline in a triangulation with polylines as constraints.
members.detailed: ct The underlying constrained Delaunay triangulation which embeds the polyline constraints cid The constraint identifier of the polyline constraint to simplify cost The cost function stop The stop function remove_points If true the function ct.remove_points_without_corresponding_vertex() is called. the number of removed vertices CDT must be CGAL::Constrained_triangulation_plus_2 with a vertex type that is model of PolylineSimplificationVertexBase_2 . CostFunction must be a model of PolylineSimplificationCostFunction StopFunction must be a model of PolylineSimplificationStopPredicate
members.argsstring: (CGAL::Constrained_triangulation_plus_2< CDT > &ct, typename CGAL::Constrained_triangulation_plus_2< CDT >::Constraint_id cid, CostFunction cost, StopFunction stop, bool remove_points=true)

members.name: simplify
members.brief: Simplifies all polylines in a triangulation with polylines as constraints.
members.detailed: ct The underlying constrained Delaunay triangulation which embeds the polyline constraints cost The cost function stop The stop function remove_points If true the function ct.remove_points_without_corresponding_vertex() is called. the number of removed vertices CDT must be CGAL::Constrained_triangulation_plus_2 with a vertex type that is model of PolylineSimplificationVertexBase_2 . CostFunction must be a model of PolylineSimplificationCostFunction StopFunction must be a model of PolylineSimplificationStopPredicate
members.argsstring: (CGAL::Constrained_triangulation_plus_2< CDT > &ct, CostFunction cost, StopFunction stop, bool remove_points=true)
